sentence: 他因为超速被处以一千元罚金。
pinyin: Tā yīnwèi chāosù bèi chǔyǐ yīqiān yuán fájīn.
english: He was fined one thousand yuan for speeding.

sentence: 这部剧的收视率创了新高。
pinyin: Zhè bù jù de shōushì lǜ chuàng le xīn gāo.
english: The viewership ratings for this drama hit a new high.

sentence: 健康的性关系建立在相互尊重的基础上。
pinyin: Jiànkāng de xìngguānxi jiànlì zài xiānghù zūnzhòng de jīchǔ shàng.
english: A healthy sexual relationship is built on mutual respect.

sentence: 工厂开始批量生产这款新手机。
pinyin: Gōngchǎng kāishǐ pīliàng shēngchǎn zhè kuǎn xīn shǒujī.
english: The factory has begun mass-producing this new phone.

sentence: 他把记录器固定在车里，记录行车数据。
pinyin: Tā bǎ jìlùqì gùdìng zài chē lǐ, jìlù xíngchē shùjù.
english: He fixed the recorder in the car to log driving data.
